series_metadata.series_description: Surety files of well owners who no longer own wells - bonds, financial statements, insurance certificates, change of owner forms, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for two years after cancellation of well owner registration. Microfilm or scan to an electronic format, then destroy. ; Microform: Retain for life of wells, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for life of wells, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
